title: Dutch Stuffed Rice Bowl
description: A savory Dutch-inspired dish filled with rice and a flavorful mixture of vegetables and meat.

ingredients.name: Mixed vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as carrots, peas, and corn

instructions: Cook the savory rice according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, cook the Dutch sausage over medium-high heat until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
Stir in the mixed vegetables, tomato paste, and cooked rice. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Spoon the rice mixture into the Dutch bowl.
